steps.t: Erkenbrand is at his camp in the hills at the western edge of the Westfold. You should speak with Erkenbrand.
Grimbold is at his camp in the hills at the western edge of the Westfold. You should speak with Grimbold.
Gamling is at Helm's Dike in the south-western Westfold. You should hasten to Gamling before the battle begins.
King Théoden stands upon the walls of the Hornburg. You should offer your sword to King Théoden as the Hornburg steels itself for battle.
